title: push-position-parity
description: Refactor Stack.Push to compute position internally from previous_node.position + TotalSize(subtree), matching C's stack_node_new (reference/stack.c:162-169). Remove the explicit position parameter. Update all callers (~12 in parser.go, ~50 in tests). Currently tracked in c-go-mismatches-checklist.md line 102 as MISMATCH.
